design_philosophy: Clean, warm, and highly legible. A productivity tool for hands-on professionals. Prioritizes thumb-friendly interaction, clear typography, and low-contrast soft UI elements to reduce eye strain in outdoor or varied lighting environments.

headings.usage: Headers, dates, numbers, and primary labels.

body.usage: Client details, notes, secondary text, and forms.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first PWA. Generous tap targets (min 44px). Soft, non-intrusive container borders with rounded edges.

navigation.mobile: Fixed bottom tab bar with 4 distinct icons (Agenda, Spese, Riepilogo, Profilo). Haptic feedback on tap.
navigation.desktop: Left-aligned fixed sidebar (w-64). Central content area with max-width container (max-w-4xl) to prevent horizontal stretching.

layout_and_spacing.buttons: h-12 sm:h-14 rounded-xl px-6 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-[0.98]

date_navigator.style: Flex container with horizontal layout. Large, bold currently selected date in the center, flanked by soft chevron buttons (h-12 w-12 rounded-full bg-white border border-stone-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-stone-50) for previous/next day.
date_navigator.behavior: Tap on date opens Shadcn DatePicker modal/popover.

client_card.layout: Vertical stack inside. Header: Client Name + Total Amount. Subheader: Address, Phone. Footer: Badges for Status and Payment method.
client_card.interaction: Entire card is clickable to open Edit modal. Subtle hover lift on desktop.

status_badge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border

fab.style: fixed bottom-20 right-4 h-14 w-14 bg-[#4A5D23] text-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer active:scale-95

bottom_sheet_modal.usage: Use for 'Add Entry', 'Add Expense', 'Add Advance' on mobile instead of center popups. On desktop, standard centered dialog.
bottom_sheet_modal.style: rounded-t-3xl bg-white p-6 shadow-2xl border-t border-stone-200

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons darken slightly (bg-[#3C4B1C]). Cards get a slightly deeper shadow (shadow-md) and border darkens.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in (opacity 0 to 1 over 200ms) when navigating between tabs.
motion_and_interactions.empty_state: Soft fade in for empty states, reassuring tone.

empty_state_image.description: A calm, empty notebook and coffee on a wooden desk. Used in the 'Agenda' tab when there are no jobs or appointments for the day.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid in kebab-case format.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize a React app with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
Implement Firebase Authentication (Email/Password) to guard all routes except login/register.
Set up a global state (Zustand or Context) or React Query for Firebase Firestore data fetching.
Collections needed in Firestore: 'users' (auth data), 'clients_agenda' (day-based client logs), 'fixed_expenses', 'worker_advances'.
Ensure all forms use Shadcn Form, Input, and Select components but customized to match the large touch-friendly sizes (h-12 to h-14) in these guidelines.
The DatePicker must work reliably on mobile. Use Shadcn calendar popover.
For the bottom mobile navigation, implement a conditional rendering or React Router setup that hides the top/side navigation and shows fixed bottom tabs on screens < 768px.
Remember to include the PWA setup (manifest.json and serviceWorker registration) so the user can 'Add to Homescreen'.
Inject fonts (Manrope and Figtree) via Google Fonts in index.html and configure Tailwind fontFamily.
Use lucide-react for all icons (e.g., Wallet, CreditCard, Landmark for bonifico, Plus, Calendar, Home, PieChart, User).
